zh.lifeSummary: 當Sancha le Blount於大約1416年出生在英國武斯特斯爾洛克時，她的父親Thomas Blount Baronet Elvaston40歲，母親Margaret De Gresley24歲。她與Edward de Langford結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1450年在法國皮卡迪索姆享年35歲，埋葬在英國波克夏雷亞丁。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sancha le Blount于大约1416年出生在英国武斯特斯爾洛克时，她的父亲Thomas Blount Baronet Elvaston40岁，母亲Margaret De Gresley24岁。她与Edward de Langford结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1450年在法国皮卡迪索姆享年35岁，埋葬在英国波克夏雷亞丁。

nameMeanings.name: le
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Thanh, Hung, Minh, Dung, Tuan, Hai, Hoa, Thuy, Son, Anh, Long, Hoang.  Chinese Hong, Sang, Chi, Dong, Tong, Lai, Hang, Man, Han, Ho, Phoung, Chan.  Korean Tam, Phong, Nam, Thai, Tuong, Chung, Thach, Tinh, Manh, Tham, Uyen, Vang.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 樂, meaning ‘happiness’ in Chinese: from the first element of the personal name Le Fu (樂父), style name of Yan, son of the Duke Dai of Song (ruler of the state of Song, reigned 799–766  BC ). Yan's grandson Le Ju (樂莒) inherited Le (樂) as his surname.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 勒: (i) from the second element of the placename Shu-Le (疏勒), an ancient state (located in present-day Xinjiang Uyghur autonomous region) during the Western Han dynasty (206  BC –25  AD ). (ii) a surname near the Bohai Sea region during the Han dynasty (206  BC –220  AD ). (iii) a surname traced back to the Hun ethnic group in northern China during the Jin dynasty (265–420  AD ).

variants.name: Yue
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Chi, Feng, Gang, Wei, Chun, Guo, Jin, Kin, Ping, Yan, Yun, Zhang, Chau, Du, Hau, Hung, My, Sau.

Mandarin form of the surname 岳 (or 嶽), meaning ‘high mountain’ in Chinese: traced back to Si Yue (四岳 or 四嶽), said to be the title of an official post in charge of sacrificial rituals on the site of famous mountains during the reign of the legendary Emperor Yao (c. 24th century BC ) and Emperor Shun (c. 23rd century BC ).

variants.name: Lok
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Ping, Tat, Wing, Ying Lin, Chi Ming, Ching Wah, Chun, Chung Man, Han, Kam, Kam Tim, Kin.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surname 樂, see   Le   1.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 陸, 鹿, 逯 and 禄, see   Lu   5 and (7-9).

variants.name: Li
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ming, Li, Jian, Hong, Yan, Ping, Jing, Yong, Ying, Hui, Jin, Min, Chung.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 李, meaning ‘plum’: (i) said to have been adopted in place of the Chinese surname 理 (also pronounced Li; meaning ‘rules’ in Chinese) by Li Zhen (利貞), son of an official called Li Zheng (理徵) in the late Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). It is said that Li Zhen's father incurred the displeasure of King Zhou of Shang (died 1046  BC ) and Li Zhen fled to a wasteland area, where he survived on wild plums. After his return to civilization, he changed his surname to Li (李 ‘plum’), a word with the same pronunciation. The original surname, 理, is said to be from Li Guan (理官), the name of a post of officials in charge of legislation in ancient China. Li Er (李耳), also known as Lao Tzu or Lao Zi, traditionally regarded as the founder of Taoism, is believed to have been a descendant of Li Zhen. (ii) adopted as a surname by the Chi Li (叱李) family from the Xianbei ethnic group during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) in the early years of the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ), sixteen high officials with different surnames were granted the surname Li (李), the surname of the royal family of the Tang dynasty, by Emperor Taizong of Tang (died 649  BC ), because of their contributions to the establishment of the Tang regime. (iv) the surname can also be traced back to several minority ethnic groups in ancient China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 黎, meaning ‘black’ or ‘multitude’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from Li (黎), the name of an ancient state (located in Changzhi in Shanxi province) during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ), which was annexed in the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ) and later granted to Fengshu, also known as Li Hou (黎侯, 'Marquis Li'). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Su Li (素黎) family, members of the Xianbei ethnic group, during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ).

nameMeanings.name: Blount
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Blunt
meanings: English: nickname for someone with fair hair or a light complexion, from Old French blund, blond (from Latin blondus) ‘blond, fair, yellow-haired’, used also of complexion.

nameMeanings.name: Sancha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: spelling of Sasha, Russian pet form of Alexander and Alexandra .

en.lifeSummary: When Sancha le Blount was born about 1416, in Rock, Worcestershire, England, her father, Thomas Blount Baronet Elvaston, was 40 and her mother, Margaret De Gresley, was 24. She married Edward de Langford. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1450, in Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 35, and was buried in Reading, Berkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sancha le Blount est née environ 1416, à Rock, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Blount Baronet Elvaston, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Margaret De Gresley, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Edward de Langford. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1450, à Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterrée à Reading, Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sancha le Blount um 1416 in Rock, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Blount Baronet Elvaston 40 und ihre Mutter Margaret De Gresley 24. Sie hat Edward de Langford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1450 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Somme, Picardie, Frankreich und wurde in Reading, Berkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sancha le Blount è nata il circa 1416 nel Rock, Worcestershire, England, sua padre, Thomas Blount Baronet Elvaston, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Margaret De Gresley, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Edward de Langford. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1450, nel Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolta a Reading, Berkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sancha le Blountが約1416年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアロックで生まれた時，父Thomas Blount Baronet Elvastonは40歳，母Margaret De Gresleyは24歳であった。Edward de Langfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1450年にフランスピカーディソンメで35歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアレアディングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sancha le Blount(이)가 대략 1416년 영국 워스스터실르 록에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Blount Baronet Elvaston(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret De Gresley(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Edward de Langford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1450년 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 리딩에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sancha le Blount nasceu aproximadamente 1416, em Rock, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Blount Baronet Elvaston, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Margaret De Gresley, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Edward de Langford. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1450, em Somme, Picardie, França, com 35 anos, e foi sepultada em Reading, Berkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sancha le Blount родилась около 1416 г. в местности рокк, ворсестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Blount Baronet Elvaston было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret De Gresley, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward de Langford. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1450 г. в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 35 лет и была похоронена в местности ридинг, биркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sancha le Blount nació aproximadamente 1416, en Rock, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Blount Baronet Elvaston, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Margaret De Gresley, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Edward de Langford. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1450, en Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultada en Reading, Berkshire, Inglaterra.
